prompt:
My disabled submit button disappears from VoiceOver. Users don't know it exists:

```swift
submitButton.isEnabled = false
submitButton.isAccessibilityElement = false
```

assertions.text: Identifies isAccessibilityElement = false as the problem — hides the control entirely
assertions.rationale: Skill's AI failure F11: hiding disabled controls
Skill's rule: disabled = dimmed, not hidden

assertions.text: Explains WHY 'dimmed' matters — user knows the control exists and what to do to enable it
assertions.rationale: Skill explains the user experience of hearing 'Submit, dimmed'
